I'm a guy and I had a similar experience at school in my teens. I was very into my own personal safety and was always paranoid that a school shoot-er was going to pull a gun on me. One day an alarm goes off and an alarm bell rings to get us out of class but no one else had come. I stayed in the classroom and tried to calm myself down until a guy entered the room and told me something like "if you leave this room now without seeing the alarm light out - you are dead". I didn't take his warning seriously though and eventually left to go back to class.

When I got in and told my classmates what happened they didn't believe me. That's when I went to the guidance counselor and told her what happened. The following day I went off school grounds near to the school to look at an old train track where my mom would take me and my sister when we were small. I ended up sitting down next to a railroad sign which told you things like that "don't tamper with the fences". I was thinking about how I was very lucky that I went back to class and not the guy who asked me to leave. I remember looking at the sign and thinking there must be thousands of signs

The United States and China are in talks that could lead to China's acquisition of the bankrupt United States Steel Corp., according to a report Sunday from the Financial Times.
President Obama has long spoken against the deal but may not be able to prevent it, the Times said.
China's state-owned steel industry is in trouble, facing competition from the U.S., and China needs a partner to help it survive, the Times said. And U.S. Steel could buy the U.S. steel maker.
The purchase by China could trigger a backlash in the U.S. Senate where Obama has lost the support of some Democrats and other members. The Senate in January passed a law that said the President could not authorize the sale unless it improved U.S. national security.
U.S. Steel filed for bankruptcy in May and has been struggling to cut its debt. If China takes over, it will have to shed some of the company in order to comply with the law.
Obama has talked about U.S. steel workers who lost jobs when China began cutting its steel production. The new China-U.S. deal could save thousands of jobs.

In the face of rapidly declining fertility rates, one study in the late '90s estimated that the population of the UK could fall by around 40 per cent by 2100 as a consequence of the fall in births and growth to the ageing population, a scenario that would have far-reaching consequences for the UK’s housing supply.
The latest estimates show that the drop in fertility rates is not expected to be as pronounced, as it has been previously assumed, and projections for UK population size seem likely to reach its 2045 peak of 68 million in 2024.
However, the ONS predicts that population growth will slow as a result of falling natural fertility rates and increasing numbers of older people, but it is likely that there will continue to be more births than deaths at mid-way point of the century; more than 100,000 a year.
The population is expected to grow by just over 2 per cent by 2033, the first time since 1951 that the annual population growth rate in the UK has been less than 2 per cent.

If you want to improve the energy efficiency and aesthetic appearance of your property, the following are some tips on installing window film.
Many people find the installation of window films intimidating, which can often lead to people opting not to use them at all. In certain areas of the home, such as your bedroom, the kitchen or your bathroom window, you might not even be able to use this type of film as it can sometimes produce the odd glitch when used on dual or triple-glazed windows.
You do need to make sure that the surface area of your window or your door is properly cleaned before application. Using commercial window cleaning products, you can ensure that the film glides effortlessly over the surface without being left with residue marks. Another important tip before installing window film is to make sure that you test your window first.
There are different types of window and glass available, and you may find that some films need to be applied on one particular type. If you have large panes of glass, double glazing or other types of glazing, speak to a professional first before purchasing the window film to ensure that it will be compatible with your particular needs.

In recent years, the idea that young adults, and children in particular, should not be allowed to be alone has become a kind of “fashionable” position. It’s quite odd. Why should parents not let children be trusted with the world alone?
But there is a good reason for them to be nervous. Many parents take their children’s safety seriously, and the thought of them being left alone and not knowing what to do if something terrible happens would be worrying for any parent.
But why should a parent not leave a child alone in the home, or for their child to be left out for a period of time, or even, in some cases, to go out or spend a day or two or even weeks without their parent?
A good rule of thumb for any parent is to make sure that their children do not leave alone in their home, and that they are not left without supervision and a suitable adult present, and that they know how to contact the police if they require help and support with their situation.
In the case of a child, parents should be very aware of any signs of abuse or neglect and make sure they understand what they mean and can act appropriately to protect their child if they need them too.

On behalf of the management and staff of the Royal Society for the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals (RSPCA), I wish to respond to the article "Dangerous dog breed" in the April 13 edition of The Sunshine Coast Daily.
While the RSPCA supports stricter legislation in regard to dangerous and menacing dogs, we do not believe one classification system that targets only one breed or type of dog will have any significant impact on dog attacks.
The RSPCA urges the council to reconsider the implementation of the mandatory registration of dangerous dogs, as the legislation will not contribute to reducing dog bite injuries and deaths across Queensland.
We welcome initiatives that aim to reduce dog bites and promote responsible pet ownership.
However, our focus is to educate the general public and encourage pet owners, through the correct training and socialisation of their dog from puppyhood, to achieve a harmonious relationship between dogs and people.
When a dog is perceived as a threat or shows aggressive behaviour, many people will react and attempt to control the animal, which can sometimes result in a bite or other injury.
It is also important to acknowledge that while breeds of dogs are commonly identified in dog bite incidences, the exact breeds of dogs involved are not always determined

You're right this is a little more complex than the comment that said "the game is rigged towards losing".

The reality is that both the house and the dealer have a built in advantage. The house has an advantage in that they offer a prize, while the dealer does not have to offer a prize, since the players are only playing against the machine and the house's cut off any prize offered by the machine. The dealer does not offer any prize. This advantage is built in to the game.

The only way to have a real chance of actually outdoing the advantage of the dealer is to have a significant advantage over the house. This can only be done by knowing the exact mathematics of the house advantage. The casino can then adjust the games to make the player's advantage as small as possible. Because of the way the house edges are calculated, an advantage with the dealer, like card counting, has to have such a large advantage that it must be completely in the players favor that they will actually get enough of an advantage to overcome the house advantage. That is why in the end, the game is "rigged towards losing".

The only way for people to be able to win consistently is if the house offers them prizes and that prize

The Dairy Queen is an ice cream store chain founded in 1940 that is currently franchising. The majority of the Dairy Queen restaurants are found in the United States, with some operations in other countries.
The Dairy Queen was established by Sherb Noble and J. F. "Bo" Garrison in Joliet, Illinois, after Noble noticed that a truck of ice cream had gone off. After experimenting with other techniques, they finally ended up with a method that kept ice cream frozen on hot days.
Garrison and Noble, who served as co-founders until their death, sold the business to B.M. Bredin (Billy) of Illinois, who began to expand the chain and later sell it to Frank Wright of North Kansas. He purchased the first DQ-brand franchise, which was located in Shawnee, Oklahoma.
The company opened a total of 20 stores and a distribution centre by early 1943. There were only 20 employees by 1944.
The Dairy Queen franchise business model has changed over the years. In the beginning, the company opened many small- and mid-size restaurants, which were gradually replaced by bigger and better restaurants as sales increased.

Pittsburgh is the sixth-largest city in the US state of Pennsylvania. The City of Pittsburgh is located on the Ohio River, where the Allegheny and Monongahela rivers meet to form a large, shallow watershed with a significant flood plain, especially upstream.
Founded in 1758, Pittsburgh is one of the oldest continuously inhabited sites of the United States. Pittsburgh is the second most populous city in Pennsylvania, as well as a major metropolitan area. With over 2.5 million people living in the city's metro area as of 2013, it is considered the largest metropolitan economy in the Mid-Atlantic, and it has the third largest urban core GDP in the nation ($540 billion).
Pittsburgh's economy is rooted in advanced manufacturing and health care businesses. In recent years, it has been the site of rapid development and redevelopment in its urban core as well as in Pittsburgh's surrounding neighborhoods and suburbs.
Cultural institutions, both large and small, are also significant to Pittsburgh's economy. Pittsburgh's large performing arts district in Downtown attracts major acts to its performance venues, as well as hosting the Pittsburgh Fringe Festival, an international performing arts festival.

I just finished up the second round of edits for The Pied Piper of Pan and, as usual, found many issues with the story in the first draft to fix.
This isn’t necessarily a bad thing, though.
Editing isn’t just about trying to make a work perfect for the current point. Instead, it’s a chance for you to fix up flaws you might’ve developed without even seeing them along the way.
As you write, the author’s ego tells you your masterpiece is going great. But that’s just you. The editor’s job is to help you get it right, and to make sure the manuscript is ready for publication.
Editing allows you to do some cleaning up of the work. Whether it’s something as simple as changing tense, or making sure you use your character’s name every once in a while.
The editing process also helps you look at the work objectively. It’s tough to ask when you’re getting an idea, and you can’t stop it. But if you can step back and take a deep breath, editing gets you back in the story.
The key to editing anything? It’s about your own vision.

text:
Meaningful, reliable and valid mRNA expression analyses using NGS requires that expression levels of known reference genes are accurately quantified. In this paper, we focus on the role of quality control of reference genes, and provide an extensive, curated and publicly available database on the performance of commonly used reference genes in a variety of tissues, cell lines and experimental conditions. We identified a set of reference genes in the blood, brain, kidney, heart, liver, lung and muscle tissue that are well-suited to normalize gene expression in any tissue and experimental condition as they are all highly stable under different conditions in all tissues tested (mean expression levels between the genes ranged from 4.9 to 21.9 log2 RPS per cell and no gene exhibited a CV > 0.01 across all tissues tested). Additionally, we provide several tools to facilitate the selection of reference genes for specific experiments: the application of the software algorithm RefMap to an experimental dataset yielded a consensus ranking of reference genes across the conditions tested. As a result, we were able to provide a stable ranking of reference genes from the blood (GAPDH, RPL13) to muscle tissue (RPL13, ACTB).

Play! There is no substitute for physical play, including ball and frisbee games. Dogs need to use their bodies to burn off energy, not just to sleep it off from all that work. Make it fun! And don’t forget the tug toys.
Grooming, or grooming. You and your dog will be happier if you can keep the dog’s coat mat-free. Use a brush to loosen hair and get it out of the undercoat. Or, use a furminator. I know this is a time consuming task that often has to be done weekly, but we are talking about better dog health, are we not? Your dog will love you for it. Don’t forget to brush your own hair after.
Teach your dog a new trick. Your dog needs to be mentally stimulated in addition to just running around out there having “fun”. It can be a tough job being a dog, after all. A new trick is sure to keep them interested. Try training your dog to retrieve! They’ll love showing off

text:
The Arlington County Board plans to vote Saturday afternoon on whether to make all new homes in its residential zones two-family or smaller, or to raise the allowed size limit through zoning changes.
The discussion is the first formal act of the Board which takes over from the county council on Tuesday as the County Board.
Under the Arlington Zoning Ordinance, all one-family homes are limited to a maximum of 20 percent or 8,000 square feet of the lot size, whichever is less. Two-family homes are not subject to the maximum lot size limit and are therefore larger.
“We believe there are better choices of how to provide additional housing,” said County Board member Christian Dorsey, who initiated a committee study on this question and will again recommend raising the minimum size limit to allow for larger homes – but also to require two or more bedrooms for all homes.
“We want to be careful not to compromise walkability and public transportation access, and that’s why we’re going into this discussion,” Dorsey added.
Dorsey’s proposal would also have new homes of up to four bedrooms be allowed, but only in the larger of the two zoned zones. It would not allow for any two-family homes to be converted to single-

I received the brass that you sent me, and I thank you very much for it. I never did hear what happened to my cartridge belt. But in my opinion no man with any taste for a rifle would want anything else than what the British had to offer. They were all very handsome and accurate little rifles. The ammunition and sights were all very fine, but my experience showed that they needed careful loading. The bullets that I was using weighed between sixty-three and sixty-six grains and were very accurate, but the first two times that I used them they were slow and went pretty far to the left. The bullet was so flat that I had to use them at five hundred yards, and I was surprised that I got so many hits as I did. I got a hit every time I shot with them, but on account of the way of loading them I think that they were not as good as the other. With the ball bullets that I was using at two hundred yards and under, I was sure hits; but with the flat bullets they did not go on that much.

text: So you have your children writing every day. Great! When and how often should they write? If you are a stay at home parent, it might be an idea for a couple of minutes every day, but if you are an occupational parent, they might be able to write only once a week. You see, I never tell parents that their children should write once or twice a day, but parents who have had training often do. So be very careful about that. One parent gave a workshop on writing to me and she told me that children should write every hour. I said, 'No. No, this is not right.' They might write every day, but don't force them to write every two hours.  Children have to be happy when they write, otherwise they won't write often. So be wise about how much they should do. Children are not a clock. Every child has his own rhythm. So you cannot tell them 'Write every five minutes!' It's so important that children have their own space when they are writing. Children are different. One can have a room for writing that has everything for writing in that room. They have writing materials, they have computers and printers, they have everything. Chronic kidney disease and end-stage renal disease are conditions in which the kidneys gradually stop functioning. CKD is caused by other diseases that affect kidneys, such as diabetes or hypertension, or by conditions that affect both the kidneys and the overall health, including heart disease.

text:
Chronic Kidney Illness (CKD) is a common disease with a high morbidity rate and a large economic burden, which has a huge impact on society. CKD is caused by renal dysfunction and pathological changes in multiple systems and organs [1,2]. The kidney and kidneys have a high metabolic activity, which is mainly involved in acid–base regulation, water metabolism, electrolyte balance, excretion of metabolic wastes, and regulation of blood pressure [3,4]. Therefore, chronic kidney disease inevitably leads to the impairment of kidney function and various non-kidney related conditions, such as cardiovascular disease, cerebrovascular disease, and bone and calcium and phosphorus metabolism [5]. CKD is a progressive disease. The more pronounced the disease is, the higher risk of development the severer the complication are, such as uremia, uremic encephalopathy, cardiovascular insufficiency, and bone and calcium and phosphorus metabolism [6].
To date, studies have showed that the risk factor of kidney disease increases with age, and patients over 80 years old were twice as likely to suffer from kidney disease than those under 70 years old. The incidence of cardiovascular disease has also been found to increase with age. The incidence of CKD, hypertension and diabetes mellitus increase in patients older than 65 years old. Therefore,

The health care reform debate has led to new proposals for a “single-payer” government health insurance plan. This proposal is often assumed to be more efficient, and some evidence suggests that it is. But in an attempt to make the case for single-payer, some advocates have ignored important efficiency considerations. The paper considers three arguments that support single-payer reform: better insurance, enhanced provider competition, and the effect of public insurance on private health insurance markets. All three arguments, it is argued, are subject to important counterarguments.
This article presents the results of two studies on the health consequences of the expansion of health insurance to the children of the working poor. Data on health care utilization and health status were obtained from three data sources. 1) A 1991 nationally representative survey of the nonelderly population; 2) Health maintenance organization memberships and survey data on health care utilization among members; and 3) Medicare billing records on hospital admissions and procedures among Medicare beneficiaries, the primary population of interest in this article. The findings suggest a modest but significant relationship between insurance coverage and health status for children in households where only one breadwinner worked.

I have the feeling that they are quite surprised when I tell them that I respect the strength and wisdom of their women. I have a sense that I can teach Western Shoshone history, but Western Shoshone women will teach me Western Shoshone life. And this is what I am seeking. I have come to know that Western Shoshone women are strong, but at the same time tender. They are wise, but also foolish. They don’t have words for words, and yet they have an extraordinary sense of the value of words and of how they can be used both to destroy and to create, to wound and to heal.

text: SRID is a tedious and time consuming assay to detect the potential binding between biomolecules. This assay is very sensitive to the protein concentration, the buffer, the sample temperature and the duration of incubation. The main goal of our proposed method was to develop a simpler and more efficient binding assay based on fluorescence polarization (FP) measurement. The method described here is a fast one and has a very small detection limit in a microvolume of sample. This method is simple to perform, and the reagents were low cost and stable, thus the assay was convenient to be used at any time as required. Fluorescence polarization (FP) is a non-linear optical method to measure molecular interactions between two molecules under specific solvent condition. Under non-linear optical condition, an external magnetic field is applied to shift the molecules to an optically preferred state, thus causing a change of anisotropy. This is due to the dipole-dipole interaction present in the molecules. The binding interaction between two molecules will cause a change in molecular alignment and therefore, the anisotropy value (An) (1) was reduced. According to the model proposed by Akin, the binding effect is measured by (2), (3) where, εo, ε1 and ε2 are the dielectric constants of the first and second

text:
If data can be HACKED or STOLEN by hackers then that data becomes property to the hackers.

I'm a little fuzzy on your wording here.  Are you arguing that there is a problem with information being stored without proper permissions, or are you talking about the right of the owner?

You're making an argument for the latter.

There is a big difference between your information being stolen from you and someone making a bad decision on whether or not to share your information, and someone not being a good custodian of your information.  It is not up to the government to make sure the latter doesn't happen.

Edit:  What you're talking about is the second problem--the loss of control over who can have your data.  You're asking for control.  This is the wrong problem.  You should *never* give the government control over this.  Don't get me wrong, you're not asking for them to take your data and sell it.  You're asking to dictate control over who gives you information to third parties.  You want to dictate who has control over your data.  This is a bad idea.  The government cannot give you this control, for the same reason you shouldn't

text:
A phase II pilot study to evaluate use of intravenous bevacizumab as salvage therapy in recurrent and previously treated epithelial ovarian cancer

BACKGROUND The use of intravenous bevacizumab as second-line therapy for ovarian cancer has become standard treatment. However, there are few prospective studies on treatment of recurrent ovarian cancer with bevacizumab in the salvage setting and data on how the different doses of bevacizumab influence efficacy and tolerability are lacking. PATIENTS AND METHODS In the Nordic multicentre trial (Nordic ovarian cancer), bevacizumab was administered in escalating doses in the treatment of women with refractory epithelial ovarian cancer, with or without a period of progression on paclitaxel. RESULTS Of 99 patients receiving bevacizumab, 45 had a partial response, 27 had stable disease, 2 had progressive disease, and 19 did not have an interim assessment. The median progression-free survival from the start of bevacizumab therapy to the start of subsequent therapy was 4.7 months (95% confidence interval (CI) 3.0–6.4). The progression-free survival from the start of bevacizumab therapy to the end of study drug was 7.2 months (95% CI 5.0–8.5). Median overall survival was 7.

The location of the July 15, 2002 flare is indicated by the square of the "P" asterisk. The solar flare was measured in the extreme ultraviolet as being in the Y-channel, which is a wavelength of about 150 angstroms. The "Y" arrow shows the position in the spectrum of the strongest emission line of O-16. This line is known to be caused by charge-exchange emission of this ion by solar radiation in the wavelength range 140-160 angstroms.
The O-17 line is about 30 times brighter than the O-16 line. This is a consequence of the fact that O-17 is two orders of magnitude more abundant than O-16 in the solar chromosphere. Both lines are about an order of magnitude stronger than the strongest line of O-18. Since only three lines of three ions exist, this line ratio is a sensitive, but reliable, measure of the density difference between the O-16 and O-17 ions. This density difference is a consequence of the difference between the rate coefficients of the charge-exchange process that produces the O-16 and O-17 lines.

text:
Stefano Guzetti is a composer, performer, and teacher in a post-industrial city in the Po valley, Italy since 2002. As a composer, I have created a series of pieces that blend the sound of my native region with the music of my adopted homeland. I do this by recording the sounds of the environment in a region that was once an active industrial area. The sounds of the water from a water mill, the sounds of the steel industry, the sounds of railroads and of iron ore trains are only some of the sounds that accompany my performances.

Ataxia is an inability to maintain proper balance and stability; ataxia manifests as frequent falls and an inability to recover from a fall. Dogs may develop seizures, which may include tonic-clonic episodes. Affected dogs also exhibit tremors and abnormal posture leading to stiff and slow movements, and the inability to keep balance and control body position. Due to the wide range of symptoms, a number of other conditions must be ruled out prior to a definitive diagnosis of MVD.
In order to correctly diagnose MVD, your veterinarian will perform a thorough ophthalmological examination to confirm the presence of posterior staphyloma, and then will attempt to determine if your dog’s symptoms are compatible with this condition. In 1973, the snow cover disappeared from the mountain top, and some parts of the snow started flowing down the mountains as water streams. This phenomenon has occurred three years in a row. During the spring, the water from snow melt is usually accumulated from the mountain and then is poured into the river downstream. In the spring of 1972, 1973 and 1974, however, snow streams were observed due to the accumulation of water from the snow melt. On the night of December 31, 1974, the storm was much stronger and the accumulation of water in snow streams on the mountains became a great flood. When we hear the word ‘attached’ it usually has some negative connotation. It is usually associated with something bad like: ‘he’s so attached to his computer’ or ‘she had an extremely attached father’ or ‘they are both super attached to each other and can’t stand to be separated’ or ‘they are so emotionally attached to each other that it is driving them apart’. I think the next car I want to do is a Honda Civic...

Horseback Horse Trail - Wander past several small herds on this wide and easy trail to the upper reaches of Canyon Creek, crossing the stream itself and following the rocky shoreline a few yards downstream before resuming a straight climb for about three fourths of a mile to the trail’s end.
Horse Trail - This trail follows the route of the ancient Paiute People who used the stream and canyon to travel between the two lakes in the basin and cross to the other side of the canyon, where it is also easier to cross the steep cliff by a long, narrow rock wall.
Cowboy Camp - If you are a hard-working cowboy it takes about 25 hours to reach the top of Mount Wilson. If you are the kind that spends an awful lot of those 25 hours sitting under a tree reading this guide, it still takes over a week. This is the only camp within striking distance of the summit.
Paleontology Hiking Trail - The first half-mile will test your will to live if you have not had a good night’s sleep. The trail leaves the trailhead on a steep uphill grade, then bends to the right, then to the left, and finally arrives at a fork

My series is set in the same world as “Wormwood” but is set centuries earlier in a different time and place. The series takes place in a semi-fictionalised version of 19th Century Britain where many of the events are set in the historical realms of 1819-1849.
During the interview I mention how I would love to see it as a TV show with Matthew Goode as Edward Dahlone, the main character. There were a few more “wouldn’t it be good” moments in the interview but I think I kept my mouth shut from that point.
When I started the series I had an image of the characters I wanted to use and from there I wrote the series, but now I feel it would work better if the characters are more central, not just as support, and that Matthew Goode could carry the show quite well.

Danish: (dœN) is to live with, and (r) is the name of the person. Danes have a high rate of consanguinity and this fact together with the lack of natural enemies has led to a high concentration of inbreeding within the population. As a result many people in Denmark have inherited the disease porphyria, which gives people problems with blood production, and also results in people suffering from liver damage during childhood. Most Danes with this ailment are of a Danish parent but a lot of them do have a Norwegian one or mixed blood. Some of this is because during the 17th and 18th centuries large numbers of Norwegian soldiers settled in Denmark during the two wars that were fought before the union between the two countries. The Danish royal family has the same problem as a large number of the families of the aristocracy are related as the ancestors of King Christian I started a war with Sweden to avoid their daughter marrying a Swedish king, and they took the opportunity to marry their own children in the hope of having a pure bloodline. The consequence of that is a high consanguinity between the Danish nobility for many centuries, and that the royal family have often been intermarried and their families often have the same names

Hannah Prendegem (1988-) has made numerous large-volume art works over the last decade and the latest is an exhibition at the Fondazione Sandretto Re Rebaudengo in Turin, Italy. The title of the show is the artist’s word Finita which refers to the final period preceding the act of creation. In many ways it is also the final act. It is also the word that has been at the root of the exhibition.
The piece at the Fondazione Sandretto Re Rebaudengo is massive. At 4.5m in length and weighing almost 40 tonnes it is the artist’s largest installation to date. It has been made in collaboration with Sven Wilken who will build the steel construction. The final work will hang in the gallery as a single suspended work.
The first piece I saw during the exhibition was a set of drawings. There is something of a contradiction here as Prendegem’s large-scale pieces and drawings are produced in direct response to the space and scale in which they are shown. When you think large you want to think deep meaning and yet there is something a little superficial about this in itself. The drawings however are also interesting because they are shown

Todrick Hallett-Date on Tuesday had his hearing set back yet again on new bail conditions. This hearing follows several previous bail hearings where Judge Michael Sivari has denied his requests for higher bail.
Judge Sivari has also denied all bond reductions for the last two months while Hallett-Date is behind bars. Sivari argued Hallett-Date is a flight risk, even though his own investigator testified during previous bail hearings that Hallett-Date is very well known to the local police.
Hallett-Date is still awaiting arraignment to his federal charges, after his preliminary hearing on his state charges was moved to May 17, 2018. Although Sivari says there is no guarantee that he would get his initial bond set, the judge did allow Hallett-Date to move his phone, laptop, and computer from his cell to his room. As of now, Hallett-Date is allowed to call his family and friends, in addition to the one phone call on Mondays and Wednesdays for 15 minutes.

Home » What will people make when their bodies age in China without being in pain to replace them?
The answer is clear: We do not expect our bodies to age without pain, so why should it be different for patients with aging or chronic conditions who cannot get relief through medicines or therapies?
One area in the world where we do see how aging affects people is China, where many patients are forced to live without pain for their entire lifespan.
They either take medicine that doesn’t work or have to learn how to manage their pain by themselves – which can be very harmful because there are many diseases associated with aging, including cancer and heart disease.
There are also other health issues that come from aging, including dementia and Alzheimer’s disease.
This is because as you get older, more blood vessels weaken and become smaller.
When this happens, the blood doesn’t flow as freely, and this leads to more pain and swelling in the body.
As patients age, their symptoms change and the level of pain becomes worse. The reason is that their pain threshold decreases over time, and as the body becomes weaker, it is not able to cope with the pain well.

As one might infer, not just your general dentist (e/ g: periodnontists, pedodontists, orthodontists and implantologists) who have been treating children and young people for years are qualified to be called as specialists.
And yet, we think not.
As parents ourselves, we appreciate the significance of the relationship between a parent and their specialist.
We are not like family practice general dentists, nor are we orthodontists, pedodontists or periodnontists. We are not simply dentists who “see kids”.
Instead, we specialise in orthodontics, and we offer a more exclusive, personalised service to our patients, and their families.
This means that we are only ever able to deliver more specialised services to a limited number of patients each year.
We limit the number of children and teens in our practice at any time, and limit the services we offer.
This means that we can be selective about who we work with, and also that we can deliver more specialised, comprehensive dental services tailored to the individual and often complex characteristics of growing mouths, faces and jaws.
At the core, orthodontics is the art of developing beautiful smiles.

For centuries in Ireland. we could see our Irish sheep sheep go into what became known as the birlinn or curragh. That was the word for what would be called a small boat in other countries.
Birlinns were used primarily for fishing, though they also had uses for hunting. In fact, it was the birlinns that gave early modern Ireland its very special name.
Because they were small enough to carry across the sea and carry out their fishing in safety and comfort. It was the fishing that gave early modern Ireland its name because Ireland was known as the land of fishermen. So when fishing was done in the early modern Ireland, that became known as the fishing in Ireland.
Fishing is still a big industry in Ireland and it has been for centuries. People come to Ireland from hundreds of miles away to fish for their catch in their local fishing grounds. That means they have come a long way from the days when they were just out on a fishing trip and caught a fish.

When it takes five years instead to a decade between albums: You realize these young musicians are busy working on their craft, as evidenced by the release of “Stick & Stones”, the fourth studio album by the popular Irish band, The Script.
With the release of their hit “The Man Who Can’t Be Moved”, The Script was catapulted to success, and the band has been working very hard since their 2007 album, #3 to follow up on their success – which they have done well, delivering a collection of pop/rock songs with a healthy dash of pop culture and humor to be added to the mix.
“Lights Out” is an upbeat song that is sure to be great for listening to while driving in your car, while “The Last Time” is a slower song, and a heartfelt ballad that touches the audience’s inner most emotions.
Overall, “Stick&Stones” is an impressive collection that shows just how much The Script has grown as a band since their release of “The Script”. Their sound is more solid and mature, and is a welcome improvement to previous album songs.

I understand there, at minimum one study where an adult person got their G5-A19A mutation and was totally asymptomatic, yet the researchers observed that that mutation can cause severe illness if you got multiple copies - it can cause severe illness and/or be lethal even in the absence of symptoms in one single copy, and even more so if present along with other mutations.

It's difficult to say whether there's a threshold at which such severe/lethal infections are prevented even in a single copy, or whether it's at least as likely to happen as with other mutations, but the study itself shows that even people with asymptomatic or mild cases can pass the virus on, and that seems to contradict what your doctor said.

I don't think it would be a case of lying on their part, but just an oversimplification, especially as they don't have full information about your health history that you do. There are also the questions of how often vaccinated vs unvaccinated people get tested, how often symptoms occur in either group, etc.

It would seem that the best thing to do is to do your best to reduce transmission to your unvaccinated child by keeping their distance from you, and getting you vaccinated ASAP.

“I was travelling to my home from the airport by bus. It was a Sunday and I was returning home early. Crow Creek - What to use?  Which tool you will carry if possible?? 
For me I have my multitool, my Leatherman, my Gerber with a nice knife attached, my Victorinox with scissors & a knife (and a pen!!).   

That said if you are only working with the smaller pliers in your multi I would consider a fixed blade knife with a small leatherman as your backup.  Or keep a small Gerber or Opinel along with your multitool.   Or if you have room for it, bring the fixed blade and some heavy duty wire twisters along with a nice small scissor knife in a sheath.   Maybe even bring a folding pliers (smaller fixed blade works if you have a small sheath for it and are not looking to carry the multi tools extra scissors/pliers.)   I would have those two things on my person all day every day and not think twice about it...

I assume they don't have a high demand on a small island but I was getting 4 Mbps and I have a good internet connection in Alameda.

Grammatologian was launched when author Siv Channard read about a girl from her birth town with Down Syndrome who was a brilliant linguist — a linguist who had created her own language.
Grammatologist is a beautiful picture book that showcases the beauty of words — and how they can be put together in many fun and unexpected ways. When the words in this book come out to be read correctly or incorrectly, the story is turned on its head, but also turned on its side. The pages are made so that when flipped, the book looks exactly like a flip-book. That way, little readers can read the book right side up, then look at the words flipped.
This book will be enjoyed by pre- and early reading children because it will intrigue them with the unusual ways in which words can be read. This book celebrates language — and what language can do. I will be buying some for our library where we can easily show the words being flipped in our copy of the book.

What is Hormadil Pren? It's the newest pregnancy category D (or D risk) medication on the Market today. Hormadil Pren is a prescription pregnancy and breastfeeding medications that doctors recommend during pregnancy. The medication is FDA approved for the treatment of migraines.
This medication is intended for both oral application and direct injection intravenously for patients with acute migraine headaches, but it can cause a variety of side effects. Migraineurs should notify their doctor immediately if they experience the following list of side effects after taking a dose of this medication: numbness, tingling, or tightness in the chest, unusual sensitivity to light, unusual sensitivity to sound, unusual sensitivity to touch, confusion, dizziness, weakness, or drowsiness, or vomiting.
Patients that find themselves in the hospital for long periods of time must make sure to let the hospital and doctor know if the person taking this medication has ever taken or is currently taking another medication that causes drowsiness and confusion as a side effect. There are lots of writers that write really quickly that have a few mistakes in their work.
They are not the worst writers, but their spell check has failed them before it’s over, or it takes them a while to fix the mistakes and to proofread, if it never does at all, and it never stops them from writing. Some errors do not need to be fixed to be effective in writing, but there is the occasional word that would be better if it was typed without correction.
Many writers use spell check as often as possible but are sometimes still hit with a few errors. It’s the one writer whose spelling fails them every single time that we should write about today. It’s a very particular skill that is only possible through lots of practice. You can’t just read a word and write it down correctly if it does not have the correct spelling. There is just no way. Laser cutting provides numerous manufacturing possibilities since the cutting system utilizes computer modeling along its automated workflow. Laser cutting machines usually use a CNC (computer numerical control) system to trace a laser.
The laser beam is cut into numerous paths which is then guided and run by the CNC program. The laser beam cuts through the material creating desired shapes or cutting a sheet of metal into different pieces.
When you hire professional laser cutting services, the staff is trained to work with the CNC system and handle the tool. The CNC system takes inputs from CAD or a 2D drawing which is designed and developed to cut the material with the laser beam.
The drawings are fed into the laser that cuts the shape of the object out of the material. Laser cutting provides accurate dimension along with intricate design precision. Depending on the material used the laser cutting system can be extremely effective in cutting the material.
Laser cutting is highly durable and versatile. Metal cutting with the laser beam is faster, precise, more cost-effective, and time-saving. If you go with laser cutting you will save money, less labor costs, easy to install and maintain, and no waste.

A very big factor in those sales are refill options; those will continue. Also if a new player joins an MMO where they are new to crafting and they want to experience crafting through crafting gear that's already a refill option, why should the company change their business model to take away something that's working? It could just as easily be that players have decided they don't enjoy crafting gear very much and therefore won't bother with it much; in both cases they should be free to choose, and the solution to that problem is that it doesn't bother them much. 

Also again, this isn't a new problem and it's not a problem exclusive to FFXIV's MMO crafting system, but that doesn't mean we have to stop improving things when there is an improvement to be made. In both cases there are solutions to be found, but one thing to always keep in mind is that you can always just play different games.

The RPM Group's primary research function provides critical guidance and planning of program components and processes, and guides program leadership in evaluating progress and outcomes.
One of the most important functions of the RPM Group is to provide a research-based assessment of the population of children and youth who have experienced a loss of a primary attachment figure(s) and/or parental engagement. As these populations are diverse and the numbers are relatively small, it is imperative that information is gathered to help the nation make informed decisions about these children. As a result, the RPM Group conducts surveys of bereaved parents and children with a loss of a primary attachment figure(s).
In addition, the RPM Group conducts studies to assess the outcomes for families in RPM. These outcomes are generally reported at the year-end survey completion point. All information is presented to the National Task Group on Bereavement in Partnership with Families and to state-focused RPM groups. Families are also provided with a copy of the survey results.

"I have one thing here (1 thing?) - let go of control for 2 hours (time spent watching movie or TV)."
It was not clear to me at this time how I can "let go" of the need to control and direct my day. It felt very confusing for me. Maybe the exercise was not clear enough.
I didn't get any further in the book at this stage until about a month later.
"I'll try to let go (of the need to control and direct), and observe what goes on around me."
I began to observe more clearly what was happening around me each day and the result of this observation was that I felt a "lift" in myself. I felt lighter and less stressed for not trying to direct what happened to me each day and how my life unfolded.
As the exercises progressed, I noticed that I was able to let go more and more quickly, in the early months. I also became less and less interested in how events occurred and how my day unfolded and I just observed them as they went by.
I also noticed that I was not getting anxious and upset about events that occurred in life and that I am a much happier person since I started this "letting go" exercise each

In May 2008 RSC Wales began developing in a series events on new digital literacies involving Wales and China and with a focus on the role of digital learning in both countries.
The events, which included a symposium at Cardiff University and a workshop with ICT experts from the People’s Republic of China, involved members of the community and stakeholders from academia, business and the media. It was established that there was scope for developing new digital literacies in Wales – not just within schools and universities, but for all sectors of the Welsh economy.
The aim of the symposium was to examine the challenges of developing digital literacies across the Welsh economy and to establish the scale of the challenge and the way in which this problem might be addressed.
This report provides an overview of the symposium and looks at some of the challenges and opportunities for new digital literacies.
The development of the internet and the World Wide Web has led to a considerable shift in the way we communicate, learn, conduct business and shop. This digital revolution which many of us experience on a daily basis is now of huge significance to Wales.

With so many companies and businesses closing over the coming year — particularly brick 'n mortar — I thought it was wise to make sure all my regular accounts and bills have the ability to be paid by Automated Clearing House (ACH) debit, instead of credit card. I'm in no way saying credit cards are bad, far from it, but this has been one important advantage.
I don't know about you, but I get the occasional phonecall from "Credit Card Services" demanding payment. They aren't so much in the habit of calling, but instead leaving a phone message informing me that a credit card has been used for some or other product or "service", or I have an overdue payment that requires my attention.
You need to know that when you have any accounts with a credit card number as security that you are giving the seller of that product the right to deduct funds from your account. In fact, even if you pay a bill by credit card, it is possible for them to debit your account directly if your account is registered for this.

The government's fiscal rule on public subsidies will stay untouched after Wednesday's talks despite the Nationalist Party's strong objections to the reform.
In a press conference on Thursday, government spokesman Stefano De Martin made it clear that the government was set to present a list of reforms for 2018 to the cabinet on Wednesday, which will not see a revision of the fiscal rule.
He explained that after a lengthy debate and a detailed scrutiny of public spending, “many areas were found to be in need of change,” but added that the government would not propose "changes that do not guarantee the government's commitment and its long-term policy".
The Nationalist Party (PN) in its statement on Thursday, immediately rejected the move. It said that, for the PN, “government reforms to the tax and fiscal rules will not be accepted unless the PN is present in a working group to review all aspects of them”.
De Martin however said that this will not affect the government's intention to push through the structural reform, since ministers already agreed that the PN needs to be part of a committee appointed to discuss the reforms. “It will not be easy to discuss the reforms in view of elections, but we will not give up the spirit of compromise,” he said.

Nation building and democracy aid was in general less ambitious at other times with similar historical or geographic factors. I guess I just wish there was a strong and compelling narrative behind the design choices to explain and inspire us. If it was a choice to keep costs in check in an open-ended, infinite universe, why couldn't we simply have a "new nation starts with 0% democracy" slider instead of an overly limiting number of choices to choose from. Perhaps if we were given more leeway we'd have more options and have to think more critically.

I'm guessing the reason for the limiting number of choices is because they didn't want to include any nations that had a chance of having a "best" way to go or at least one better than others. But this also makes it less of a "what if" game I.e. you can't have the British Empire with an unassailable world hegemony nor can you build a powerful Germany and then start WW3 to finish the job.  It's just...so one dimensional.

When it comes to the new type of product, new, many people just assume that new = something new in the same place you already use the old product. The reality is that new products are often different in their intended purpose and what it takes to use them. They may have been designed for a specific market, but are different because of that. Sometimes this difference is minor and the difference is only noticeable to the people who use the product, like the difference between a computer and a tablet computer.

The suspects are from Tandongi police station and were among the officers that were deployed to protect the school children as they went home as a result of protests and demonstrations that were triggered by the death of Henga.
Henga had gone to the protest that happened on Monday. While returning home he was shot dead. According to the Independent Policing Oversight Authority(IPOA) , a bullet that killed the victim was fired by one of the 18 police officers on duty that day.
His death and the way in which Henga was killed as well as the manner in which the suspects have already been arrested have been compared to the death of Brian Ogalo of Embakasi East who died while being arrested in February 2013.

It is certain from archaeological evidence that all the houses were on the slope from the north to the south of the hill.
There are three types of houses: domicilia, villas and palaces.
A villas was a farmhouse near Colonia, which was usually located at the foot of the mountain, and was equipped with large and beautiful halls and atria.
A palaces was located at the top of the hill and was equipped with large rooms and halls.
A domicilia was a farmhouse that was usually located near the city.
A domicilia had small rooms and was mainly used for agricultural use.
All the houses had a courtyard, which was used for bathing in the hot summer months.
These houses were often in use in their place during this period.
The houses were usually divided into the following categories, although their size was sometimes larger or smaller.
The villa was the largest of them all, which had an atrium

With one exception...  "Fascinating", an adorned female is my one exception though. 

That is, I don't really find a woman "beautiful" when I first meet her nor find her attractive right away.  If she is then she is a very strange female, and she will have a lot of work to do to get me to find her attractive.  It's very rare that a woman is both very beautiful and "lovely" (that is, interesting, intelligent, has some sort of wit, a good sense of humor, etc) right away.

The one exception is "Fascinating". An adorned female - a female who wears many different types of makeup and accessories, often dressed up in interesting and flashy types of attire that makes me stop and goggle.  I see such a lady and I am always struck by her beauty (and she is indeed quite often very pretty as well) in spite of having little in common with her.

 A fascinating lady is a very rare creature indeed.

Gov.-hunt candidate Mark Eames spoke publicly Tuesday about sexual and verbal harrassment he endured at the hands of his former boss, who is now in prison.
Mark Eames, a candidate for the Maine GOP primary for governor, was interviewed by News Center Maine on Wednesday night about the sexual and verbal harassment he endured at the hands of his former boss when they worked in Portland.
The interview takes place shortly after Gov. Paul LePage issued an affidavit saying that former Secretary of State Charlie Brittain harassed his former subordinate in 2005. Eames was one of seven women interviewed by News Center Maine for a story on Brittain's accusations of harassment.
Eames, who filed a sexual discrimination suit against his former boss in 2008, explained how Brittain would often grab his arms, rub his shoulders and pinch his upper chest. Eames also described how he would sometimes hear Brittain's ex-wife, Joann Brittain, yell at him for not keeping his head up when walking.
Eames said he also received harassing and vulgar text messages and phone calls from Brittain's ex-wife. Brittain's attorney recently released records of conversations about his ex-wife making disparaging remarks about Eames and his sexual orientation.

That just means that he could stay alive? Just as an example, if the hero is going to die, but the hero defeats the big bad anyways, that would still keep the character's goal of saving everyone alive.

For every company looking on as global growth trends change and their customers increasingly become a more heterogeneous bunch, global talent management remains a key issue. This means the need to identify, attract, retain and nurture talent that can meet the needs of a global workforce has become more important than ever.
Yet the challenge for many is in achieving consistency when it comes to defining and implementing talent management processes across different regions because it is all too simple to fall into the trap of using different models or different language in different regions. This may sound innocent enough on the surface, but such an approach leads to inconsistency, and thus often ineffective global talent management. In addition, such an approach often leads to an inane attempt to ‘internationalise’ programmes by simply replicating approaches and using a different language. If the local culture, language and market does not allow for the same approach then it will not work, and thus such a local internationalisation attempt will end up being pointless.
However, we often find that most companies are actually taking the much easier way out by doing little to nothing at all. To some extent this must be due to a lack of a common vision for talent management at a corporate level. However, with better talent management and with better tools such as HR analytics,

As your representative during open floor plans the first three columns contain: -1st Column #- represents order of how the characters are placed. The "1" is first. This is what it will look for visually. -2nd Column #- will place the character on the floor tiles. -3rd Column #"- will place the starting tile. The "00" is first. So if 00 was selected, the character will not start on a tile, it will not start with any movement, and it appears to appear with your floor. -4th Column "0" - will be for what your "0". The "0" means that the move will not continue, the character does a move, stops completely, then ends the turn on the current tile. -5th Column #- is for moving forward. The "3" is to tell it to move forward 3 times. So it will only move forward three times, and nothing else. -6th Column #"- The "1" for that column is for which direction the movement happens. The "E" is east facing movements. The "W" is west facing movements. So for example: 1E0 means that the entire character does a one direction movement. 1SW00 means

Speaking to journalists accompanying Sisi during the visit, Madbouly said that the meeting discussed ways to develop the civil aviation and airline sector, as well as the national program to develop and modernise the air traffic services.

He also said that meetings are currently underway to amend the law governing civil aviation to suit the Egyptian market.

On August 19 the European Broadcasting University announced several initiatives in an academic and entrepreneurial program for the development of a sustainable broadcasting infrastructure and a sustainable business development (the EUCARD project and EUCARD II).
A special program will be held for representatives of EBU member broadcasters. EBU President Gilles Marchand will welcome media executives and experts, both European and international, with talks and discussions on the future of broadcasting.
EBU Chief Technology Officer Christoph Böhnlein will hold two presentations on the subject of IP-based broadcasting, the IP ecosystem, and the way forward to the EBU and IPBC. In addition, there will be an interview with Böhnlein by EBU Vice President of Technology and Innovation Philippe Corthésy.
The presentation also will include the results of a recent EBU survey on the future of broadcasting, as well as the findings of research commissioned by the EBU looking at the impact of the new broadcasting technology on existing business models.
Presentation: The EBU in 2021 and the future of broadcasting.
IP-based broadcasting – the current situation.
IP ecosystem: the role and opportunities of the EBU in an IP-Based broadcasting future.
IPBC – a sustainable future.

When planning and purchasing materials, the primary purpose it always meets peopleââ-''â„¢s wants and needs, as well as the cost. When making plans for a home or business, there are three key factors to consider: the location of the project, the quality of construction materials, and the overall design.
In the past, the primary method of building a home or business was to use timber as the main construction material. Wood provided a solid and attractive building material that was easy to work with and maintain. As modern home and business styles began to include elements of modern design, however, timber construction became less practical due to the maintenance and replacement costs.
To make building more cost-effective, architects began to explore other building materials. One such option was steel. Although not easily worked with, steel provided a strong, durable material that was easily shaped and customised. This made steel a practical choice for architects, as well as home builders and business owners.
Although a good construction material, steel requires an alternative material to cover it, especially if you want your construction to have that smooth, aesthetic appearance. Steel construction is prone to corrosion and rust due to its high density. Aluminium covers steel, and acts as a shield against corrosion

I know how people go back-&-furthal but I prefer keeping as few tabs as possible open. I've never had a tab crash and if it did, it wouldn't be the end of the world just restart the computer. I still have all my other tabs on the side.

But for those that do mind, try this:

1. Open up the Firefox browser and go to about:config
2. Find the line for "browser.tabs.savePlace" and double click it. Set it to false
3. Then go on about:addons or just go to the addons tab from the top of your browser and search for "Tab Manager":
4. Add this addon then make sure the extension is enabled then hit the "Pin tab" option on the extension toolbar. Now when you have a bunch of tabs open, they will automatically arrange themselves, if you can't find a tab that's too small for the bar, just pin it and it'll stay there forever more. Hope it helps.

The day before yesterday, while I was in the other room, the cat was on the armrest. The chair slipped and she went down on to the cold kitchen floor. I couldn’t find her, and I was so flustered, I didn’t think to look behind my back. But I did finally, and she was curled up there – in the darkest and coldest, most neglected part of the kitchen – on all fours.

Fear-induding reports about Uyirmaai from K’tani (originally “Aruvippuram”) indicate that an ancient city, capital of the kingdom of Pandyas, was razed to the ground and completely destroyed by a tsunami in the 1st century CE. In the 7th century CE, the town of Mudugal came into existence in the vicinity of the place of the ancient city. By the 14th century CE, it had acquired the status of a major port city, and was an important centre for the trade between India and Arabia.
Traders from the Middle East (or, more precisely, the Arabs of the Persian Gulf) also came to be known as Maravars (Maranars). They came to India in large numbers for business purposes, and in the mid-14th century CE, they were granted the right to settle down permanently on the Malabar Coast under a system called “Shatkara”. For this arrangement to operate, a permanent head-quarters was established at the place known as Cheraman Juma Mosque – a prominent mosque constructed by the Cheraman Perumals (a dynasty from Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu).

Mt Baker-1: New Moon Cycle...This picture sums our cycle thusfar very well...It is a mix of winter and spring! Snow, sun and frost.
We have been experiencing our typical late winter cycle this week with a series of storms that have dropped anywhere from .4 to just under a couple of feet at various locations throughout Mt. Baker.
The snowline is still low but is rising and more snowfall is on the way into next week!
While we had one sunny day last week the past few days have had a significant amount of cloud cover mixed in with lots of snow flurries for most of the day. Today will be mostly sunny but temperatures will remain a bit below average so that the snowpack is protected. We have already had some light freezing rain, with some more on the way later in the week.
Weather Patterns Forecast: The weather pattern will turn to more normal conditions.
Snow: Moderate overnights and up to 3" this morning. Moderate during the day.
Mt Baker-Snoqualmie Forecast: Mostly cloudy throughout the day. High temperatures will hover around the freezing mark. Moderate overnight and up to 3" of snowfall expected tonight

I feel this and this comment are very related because it reminds both us  (in part)  of how we got this into our heads  and  how we view relationships.   

Many men I know have grown up thinking there is this thing called love or connection and when they get it, and it gets them, when someone who is important to them loves them, they feel safe, secure, and comforted. It makes them feel good and they feel good about themselves. 

They see it as a magical thing that just *happens* and sometimes they get it. Other times they don’t.

But they don’t  realize that they are only *looking for it*... that they’re looking for a feeling. And when they find that feeling they *think* they’re looking for the thing. And they think they’ve reached a destination, an end.

It’s just a state of being.  I’ll be back in that state soon. But now for a little while it’s not and the uncertainty can be very scary. I don’t know if he is truly a Narcissist as I have not looked into this enough to be able to say.

A big challenge you hear every time an author says he got the "big breaks he would get" is the "agent thing".  I read about an author who started getting agents after 15 published books, that means he had 15 years of rejections.

Rejections are a normal part of the process, and they are going to happen no matter how good your writing is or how much support you get.  So for all these people saying, "you just need to get a better agent," consider my advice: get a better agent than me and I will never send you a rejection message again.  I got into an agent lottery where I was competing with probably thousands of entries and I won the lottery.  A million to one shot, I got lucky and I should be writing the next great American novel, but my agent never sent a rejection message.

My point, is that the agents are the gatekeepers for the publishing industry and they are where the first wave rejections come from.  They were the ones that rejected over 15,000 entries from my publisher to get only one, so they can't all be bad.  They just want what they want and they are not going to tell you why. Toyland Adventures began as nothing... just simple little adventures. These may have included simple little games, but over the years they have become something bigger. When the first adventure began, it was just that, nothing. But as the years progressed and adventures came and went it became quite clear to the Adventurers what they should do.

The Adventurers set out on an epic quest. They wanted to find something to make them feel something. They wanted to feel fulfilled. But they got a little lost. They got a little scared.
In the end, they found an epic adventure they never knew they wanted. They found their heart. Their adventure became more than they ever could have imagined.

We have already informed all passengers through our emails sent to the booked contacts during October that flight EY27 is operated by a different manufacturer (Airbus) than the EY26 - our other routes from/to Vienna. We have also informed all passengers that there is a possibility of a delay for our aircraft which have a lot longer distance to travel as the Vienna flights have a maximum payload per flight of 90 passengers and the long haul EY26 and EY27 have a maximum payload per flight of 250 passengers.
The decision to operate the flights on a larger aircraft for these dates was made a long time ago and the only way to avoid a cancellation is to increase the payload from 90 to 250 and unfortunately it results in a delay - but this is the only option.
This type of event is outside our control and there is no option for us to change flight dates. We want to be 100% transparent to our passengers and make it as clear as we can and this is the best we can do. Our passengers are fully aware of this when they book flights, in line with the terms & conditions, I hope now you can understand what we meant when, due to certain unforeseen circumstances, we have to offer a delay instead of a cancellation.

"Dry Creek Falls are only available in Summer..."
For those who wish you go see the Dry Creek Falls in the summer! A little help getting to the Falls.
The Dry Creek Falls parking lot is located off of Dry Creek Road in the Mt. Baker Sno Park. After you park you have the option of either hiking along the trail next to Dry Creek, or you can take an un-maintained trail on the right about 200 yards up the trail. Follow the trail until you reach the Dry Creek Falls.
You will most likely have to wade your through some very muddied water to get up to the first small falls. I think it would be much easier to climb up to the falls on the back side of the creek.
As always wear proper hiking attire and proper hiking boots. Dry Creek Falls are only available in Summer so when it’s a hot one this is one of my go-to’s to cool off!

This new toolbox comes standard in the ProfiXion-Matic 4/5 Axis mill and lathe.
It comes in a sturdy, portable carrying case and has been designed to make your production time more accurate and your production more efficient.
Made from a durable, non-reversible, hardened alloy steel, it has four 1/2" diameter, pre-drilled through holes to position the tool at the exact center of the work-piece.
Two of the holes are 1-1/2" from the bottom of the tool for the milling-mill tool; the other two are 1-13/16" from the side of the tool for the lathe tool.
A small "T" mark is placed on the two side holes to indicate which is which (bottom/side).
You can still use the bottom hole if you use the T-handle tool holder (included, see picture), but because the T handle is longer than the standard mill and lathe tool, the holes on the tool holder need to be offset 1/8" in both directions for the center-to-center hole spacing.

In Acta Universitatis Latviensis. Series B, Geology. No 2: 29-36. ISSN 1403-4015. ISBN 978-9984-78-934-3.
The new approach to the analysis of the structure of the Cretaceous-Tertiary (K-T) boundary in East Latvia was developed based on the new method “Multidimensional Analysis” and applied in the geological map of 1: 200 000 “East Latvia”. The new method is based on multi-dimensional scaling and is a powerful tool for the visualization and quantitative analysis of three-phase geological structures. It is a modern alternative to the statistical analysis of the data from different fields of geological sciences, that may be helpful for their visualization and interpretation. The application of “Multidimensional scaling” enabled us to show the main structural relations in the studied area.

The B. Rado-Ortelion Company founded, on April 30, 1932 to meet the growing demand for mechanical watches in Russia. The first watches developed by engineers of the Radomir and the Ortelion, with the brand name “Oretelion, Radomir, Rado” or “Radomir” were sold initially by private individuals who did not want to have anything of the German Reich. With the establishment of the People’s Republic of Bulgaria as one of the first communist states the German Reich watches were banned in 1935 and the production was shifted to watches made by local companies. Production in Sofia ended in 1961 and the Rado watch Factory is nowadays one of the most modern watch manufacturers in Europe.

This book explores modern social work policy and ethics: their philosophical presuppositions; relationships; and implications for professionalism. The authors draw on the philosophy of science to highlight the connections between ethical approaches in work with clients and families and theories of objectivity. In doing so, they offer a theoretical rationale for the adoption of postpositivist paradigms in modern social work as an alternative to postmodernism and critical theory. The book also provides a basis for developing a research agenda in social work ethics and a theoretical foundation for a practical guide to the effective use of philosophical theories.
Philosophical Foundations of Social Work Practice is an extremely timely text that offers the best of both postmodernism and positivism. It is both practical for the student and useful for the academic.
Dr Stephen M. Burt is Professor Emeritus of Sociology & Social Work at Memorial University of Newfoundland. Having worked as a community organizer during the 1970s, he joined the Faculty of Social Work in 1978 and held the positions of Chair of the Department of Social Work (1984-1985) and Director of the School of Social Work (1987-1990). In his current role at Memorial, he continues to teach and to develop programs of research on social work

At least 80 new cases of coronavirus have been identified in children in the last week at a school in the south of France.
An outbreak of COVID-19 has hit a school in the town of Nîmes in Occitanie, which has seen around 80 cases.
Since the beginning of the spring, some 150 cases have been reported in France out of nearly 600 that have been identified since the start of the pandemic.
"This is extremely rare (in France)," Xavier Bertrand, a doctor and former health minister at the regional council of Occitanie, told French daily Le Figaro.
The cases at the school have spread in class from "a child who had already tested positive" since the start of February.
According to the town hall, "everyone was tested this Monday", of which 40 people were confirmed to have been infected.
The outbreak has led the school "to be temporarily closed in view of decontaminating the place," said the town hall.
"The vast majority of infections are in children aged between 7 and 11 years old, who in turn have been in contact with several dozens of other children," confirmed Bertrand.

Henry VII was born 29 Jan 1457 in Westminster, England.
The king was not known as Henry V until he became king after the death of his father in 1413.
Henry IV had no children, and the succession had been in dispute between Henry IV's son John of Lancaster and Henry's brother-in-law Richard, Duke of York. Henry IV was declared "deceased" shortly before his death, and the Duke of York declared himself king.
Henry VII was crowned in 1485 at Westminster Abbey by Archbishop Thomas Wyatt, Archbishop of Canterbury.
Henry VII's second wife was the former Elizabeth Blaux, a wealthy widow. The marriage was a political one, in which Henry obtained a wife, and Elizabeth a husband.
The king's father, Henry VI, passed his kingdom to his first-born son, Edward (The Black Prince), in 1422.
Edward's successors were his two daughters, Catherine of Valois and Margaret of Anjou.
Catherine's marriage to the French king in 1420 was the starting point for the Hundred Years War

One major complaint many parents say to Child Services regarding “unauthorized” placement or supervised parenting time is one parent’s failure to take the court-ordered visitation or parenting time with the non-custodial parent.
But what exactly does it mean for a visitation situation to be supervised or for there to be visitation restrictions?
Courts can require one or both parents to comply with “visitation plans” or parenting schedules when parents are either getting a divorce or custody cases where there is abuse or substance abuse.
Courts can order parenting time to be supervised in a separate location by a third-person who the court will usually select called a Guardian Ad Litem. In addition, the guardian ad litem may be used by the court to investigate the family and provide recommendations.
Many parents can agree with the guardian ad litem to have a plan that allows supervised visitation and parenting time.
Although it seems like an inconvenience, if the court has ordered supervised parenting time and visitation, it is important for parents, guardians, and other persons acting as or assisting with parenting time to comply and stay consistent with the parenting plan.
If your non-custodial parent is not complying with the visitation, then you should contact your local Child Services

Chapter 4: The first impression: Some social and cognitive aspects.

There seem too get quite mixed information regarding the type and style of foot pads being installed today on our classic Jaguars. In this page we attempt to explain the various types of pads and describe the application requirements for each.
Note: Please refer to the relevant pages in the Jaguar Spare Parts section for further information relating to various other products supplied by Classic Jaguar Parts Limited relating to Jaguar Pads and Discs.
A: As you are likely to be aware the main purpose of a brake pad is to transmit the braking effort, via the wheel, to the brake rotor. This is done by having a friction material such as cast iron or a composite of cast iron and high temperature resins. These materials are used due to their high heat-bearing properties.
A brake pad also transfers rotational effort from the wheel to the caliper mount, to counter the moment of inertia of the rotor, via its brake backing plate.
Friction pads are normally made from composite materials where iron and high heat resistant resins have been blended together to form a strong and rigid backing plate. A backing plate normally does not have to be as rigid as the caliper mount, where cast iron is preferred. Where a composite pad is used it offers less noise, less vibration and

Brymner says their efforts stem form a greater urgency these day for companies not just to attract new clients and investors, but to secure their loyalty in a rapidly changing business landscape.
That doesn’t just mean the company’s existing clients. It also means the company must secure the interest and potential business of potential clients. And that means more than just sales pitches and cold calling, but also a proactive effort to cultivate potential clients in what Brymner refers to as “top of mind awareness,” or making sure that potential clients are aware the company and its products or services exist.
Brymner says while this is certainly an essential component of effective branding and marketing campaigns, it remains the most complex element, since not every industry or brand is the same.
When businesses are attempting to rebrand or reposition themselves in the marketplace, those efforts are often met with resistance from loyal fans or customers who feel threatened by change.
One of the great challenges that face companies attempting to reposition themselves is to develop a new identity that is still somehow connected with their original identity, Brymner says.
That’s why Brymner says all successful rebrands or repositionings follow a fairly predictable path: They have a strong core identity

Crucification - the Christian cross. Not much explanation is found by looking upon or meditating on it that it was so called; but upon reflection a person may easily deduce from the structure that was intended to be the symbol of the cross, that its name is derived from the manner of its being formed. Crux is the Latin word. It was the principal tool used by the Romans in making crosses. The cross was formed in a kind of lathe or turning instrument, and was made by a process of rotation around an axis which passed through one of the points of the cross. After the timber had been cut according to proper dimensions, it passed through the cross-slitting of a kind of disk, and was turned out a perfect cross, with each point at the right angle relative to the other. A Roman soldier was often crucified for crime, and he was thus made to carry the symbol and the shame of his own crime on his cross. This instrument was the symbol of that instrument of death, on which was formed the instrument of the cross of Christ. The cross is a word, and the cross is an instrument. When God designed a symbol to express a great work of his grace, he chose the same word and the same instrument as were

In general my biggest thing i takeaway that I never seem the people complaining really like. Even if they do have a valid point, what they get instead is a lot of "you are wrong and i am right" statements and no conversation. 

But even in that if the person who has a complaint never actually brings it up. If you see a problem in the game and never mention it and bring it up people don't go "hey i see you are upset with X issue". They go "who is this person, what are their complaints?"

If they were to say something like "hey this is a valid complaint i see it all the time and i want them to fix it" people would go "well that is great and you are free to do what you want with the game". But if they don't even open the way for people to listen to their complaint they never will get the attention in the first place.

Travisa: An interactive environment (HEnRA for Human Evolution NeTworks) is a new web based resource designed to help users build hypotheses and identify the genetic structure of a human population/population sample. It is a freely accessible website that provides a tool for creating simulated human populations based on demographic history and a genetic background (defined by genetic diversity of a panel of reference samples and/or admixture model), and a mechanism for evaluating how well the simulated population(s) fit the observed genetic structure in a panel of external samples (known and unknown). The user specifies known demographic history and creates populations representing hypothetical populations, which allows them to determine which populations can be best described by which demographic or admixture model (or combinations of these). A variety of genetic data is possible, including SNP array genotypes or haplotypes in reference samples. The system also accommodates alternative demographic assumptions (e.g. unobserved founder populations, admixture, post-admixture migration, or population isolation). The final output is a web browser-friendly format that lists the simulated populations and their likelihood of matching the specified external populations or an unknown sample.
A tutorial is provided at the start of the TravISA website. The website is designed to be very intuitive
